mapper.sql: id, parent_id, name, path, component, icon, sort, menu_type, permission, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.name, m.path, m.component, m.icon, m.sort, m.menu_type, m.permission FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.sort ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.name, m.path, m.component, m.icon, m.sort, m.menu_type, m.permission FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN edu_teacher_role tr ON rm.role_id = tr.role_id WHERE tr.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.sort ASC
SELECT id, parent_id, name, path, component, icon, sort, menu_type, permission, status FROM sys_menu WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC

SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.name}, '%')
AND status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY parent_id ASC, sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY parent_id ASC, sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE name = #{name} AND parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu (parent_id, name, path, component, icon, sort, menu_type, permission, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{path}, #{component}, #{icon}, #{sort}, #{menuType}, #{permission}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, icon = #{icon}, sort = #{sort}, menu_type = #{menuType}, permission = #{permission}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_menu SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_menu SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
